# {{VAULT_NAME}}

> {{VAULT_TAGLINE}} An agent-ready Obsidian knowledge base in plain Markdown — usable by any LLM or agent.

## Start here

- [Agent contract (AGENTS.md)](AGENTS.md): conventions, frontmatter, directory map, operating rules
- [Index](index.md): catalog of every note — read first to orient
- [Activity log](log.md): append-only record of changes
- [README](README.md): what this is and how to set it up

## Notes

_(Add links to your notes here as the vault grows, or rely on index.md.)_

## Skills (agent capabilities)

- [Skills index](.agents/skills/INDEX.md): all vendored Agent Skills, with "use when" for each — usable by Claude, Codex, and any SKILL.md-aware agent
- [Skills mechanism & how to add more](.agents/SKILLS.md)

## Optional

- [Plans](plans/): in-progress plans & brainstorms
- [Compounded learnings](docs/knowledge/): reusable learnings from past cycles
